title: Shared Public Runtime For Moment Pages
summary: Moved generic moment-page URL, fetch, text, sizing, and image-source helper use onto the shared public catalogue runtime.
effect: The public moment route now uses the same low-risk runtime helper surface as public work and series pages, reducing moment.js maintenance risk without changing the page rendering contract.
verification: node --check assets/js/public-catalogue-runtime.js && node --check assets/js/moment.js && node --check assets/js/work.js
Browser smoke on http://127.0.0.1:4000/moments/4-stories/ confirmed title, body, hero image, srcset, script order, and no console errors.
Playwright desktop and mobile viewport smoke confirmed rendered title, body, hero image, and srcset.
